title: P26B record P26 result
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'P26':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = 'fa40ee24cbf3b1200727a02934df9e1d1c659a33'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:14:12Z'
    if task.get('id') == 'P26B':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:15:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:14:12Z','id':'P26','trace_id':'p26_three_file_model_migration_repair','sha':'fa40ee24cbf3b1200727a02934df9e1d1c659a33','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
if line not in existing:
    log_path.write_text(existing + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/P26B_RECORD_P26_RESULT_QUEUE_LOG.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P26B','trace_id':'p26b_record_p26_result_queue_log','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'recorded_step':'P26','recorded_sha':'fa40ee24cbf3b1200727a02934df9e1d1c659a33','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'P27 real roadmap execution audit from state and reports'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/P26B_RECORD_P26_RESULT_QUEUE_LOG.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# P26B | Record P26 result in queue and log\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nP26 marked DONE in ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and execution_log.jsonl received one P26 record with SHA fa40ee24cbf3b1200727a02934df9e1d1c659a33. Workflow lock respected.\n\nNext: P27 real roadmap execution audit from state and reports.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
